channel.title: Trendlyne Latest Market News
channel.description: Latest stock market insights and analyst calls from Trendlyne.

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - March 6, 2026
item.description:
1. Apollo Tyres: This tyres & rubber products company fell 4.6% in the past week as rising crude oil prices raised concerns about higher raw material costs. Tyre manufacturing relies heavily on crude-...

item.title: Market closes lower on rising crude oil prices and foreign investor outflows
item.description:
Nifty 50 closed at 24,450.45 (-315.5, -1.3%), BSE Sensex closed at 78,918.90 (-1097, -1.4%) while the broader Nifty 500 closed at 22,481.30 (-216.5, -1.0%). Market breadth is in the red. Of the 2,749 ...

Premium: No

item.title: Five stocks to buy from analysts this week - March 5, 2026
item.description:

item.title: The biggest losers of the Iran war
item.description:
I've increasingly come to believe that a day without Donald Trump in the headlines is a positive news day. The man with the deep orange tan rarely brings good news. Unfortunately, Trump loves being in...

item.title: Bad timing: New listings sink on debut amid market turmoil
item.description:
The Nifty 50 closed on Monday with a sharp fall, sliding over 1.2%. The sell-off follows a weekend escalation in the Middle East after the US and Israel launched coordinated strikes across Iran. The a...

item.title: Five Interesting Stocks Today - February 27, 2026

item.title: Profit expectations across industries grow more sensitive to costs

item.title: We tracked 5 years of IPOs. Some hard truths for investors about returns
item.description:
